dogs.name: Koda
dogs.notes: Senior dog — MAX 5 miles per day at relaxed pace

dogs.name: Monty
dogs.notes: Young and energetic — use beaches and off-lead fields to burn energy

stays.name: Glendale Airbnb
stays.location: Lower Milovaig, Glendale, Isle of Skye, IV55 8WS

days.title: Pulloxhill → Gretna Green
map_waypoints: Leicester Forest East Services M1 J21
Tebay Services Westmorland M6 J38 northbound Cumbria
Gretna Green Famous Blacksmiths Shop DG16

stops.name: Leicester Forest East Services
stops.detail: ~100 miles from Pulloxhill. Grass area for dogs. Coffee stop. Aim ~10:45.
stops.maps_query: Leicester Forest East Services M1 LE3 3GB

stops.name: Tebay Services (M6 J38)
stops.detail: Best motorway services in UK. Farm shop, outdoor seating, dog walk field. Aim ~13:00. Fuel here is expensive — Penrith Tesco (J40, 5 min off motorway) is significantly cheaper if the tank is low.

stops.name: Gretna Green Famous Blacksmiths Shop
stops.detail: Walk the dog-friendly grounds. Indoor museum not dog-friendly.
stops.maps_query: Gretna Green Famous Blacksmiths Shop DG16

eating.name: Smiths at Gretna Green
eating.detail: Dog-friendly restaurant on site — book a table.
eating.maps_query: Smiths at Gretna Green Restaurant DG16 5EA

notes: Fill tank before leaving — Tesco Flitwick (5 min, MK45 area) or Asda Dunstable (near M1 J11) are cheap starting options
Tebay (J38) is great for lunch but fuel is expensive — if below half, detour to Penrith Tesco J40 (5 min) or Asda Carlisle J44 (20 miles before Gretna, much cheaper)
Leave by 09:00 — M6 busy Saturday afternoons
Plug in BMW on arrival — confirm 3-pin socket with Airbnb host before trip

days.title: Gretna Green → Rowardennan

stops.name: Chatelherault Country Park, Hamilton
stops.detail: ~100 miles from Gretna, M74 J6. Stunning Duke's Bridge walk, off-lead woodland. Excellent facilities. 30 min comfort break. Aim ~11:00.

stops.name: Loch Lomond Shores, Balloch
stops.detail: First sight of the loch. Lochside boardwalk, cafes, dog walk. 30 min stop.

stops.name: Drymen Co-op
stops.detail: Last shop before Rowardennan. Stock up for 3 nights. Mon-Sat 07:00-22:00, Sun 08:00-20:00.

notes: Fuel: Asda Hamilton near Chatelherault (already stopping there) is cheapest on this route — fill up there. Avoid Drymen Co-op petrol — tiny rural forecourt, premium price. No fuel at Rowardennan.
Last 7 miles from Drymen is single-track
Plug in BMW at Airbnb overnight

days.title: Inchcailloch Island + Loch Katrine Cruise

stops.name: Inchcailloch Island Ferry
stops.detail: 5-min ferry from Balmaha. 1.5-mile woodland loop, sandy bays. Dogs ride free. Call ahead day before.

stops.name: SS Sir Walter Scott — Loch Katrine
stops.detail: 45 min drive to Trossachs Pier. Iconic 1899 steamship. Dogs welcome. Book online.

stops.name: Katrine Wheelz e-bikes (optional)
stops.detail: At Trossachs Pier. E-bikes ~35/day. Call 01877 376316 re dog trailer use.

notes: Call Balmaha Boatyard day before — ferry runs on demand
Book Loch Katrine online for guaranteed slot in May

days.title: WHW Walk + Doune Castle

stops.name: WHW: Rowardennan to Ross Wood
stops.detail: Flat lochside path — 1.5 miles each way = 3 miles total. STOP at Ross Wood. Do NOT push to Sallochy.

stops.name: Doune Castle
stops.detail: Monty Python Holy Grail filming location. Dogs in grounds. Tag-team the interior.

notes: Max walk today: 3 miles (Ross Wood and back) — well within Koda's limit
Check Doune Castle opening times: historicenvironment.scot

days.title: Rowardennan → Ballachulish + Golf

afternoon_tea.name: Inverlochy Castle Hotel
afternoon_tea.detail: 3 miles north of Ballachulish. One of Scotland's finest afternoon teas. Book ahead.

stops.name: Real Food Cafe, Tyndrum
stops.detail: Best fish & chips on the A82. Dog-friendly outdoor seating.

stops.name: Dragon's Tooth Golf, Woodlands Glencoe
stops.detail: 9 holes, mountain backdrop. Club hire included. Dogs welcome on site.

stops.name: Glencoe Village
stops.detail: Short walk in the valley. NTS Visitor Centre nearby.

eating.name: Real Food Cafe, Tyndrum
eating.detail: Famous for pies, fish & chips and burgers. Dog-friendly outside seating. On the A82 — hard to miss.

notes: A82 north from Tarbet is one of Scotland's great drives — enjoy it
Fuel: Tyndrum and Glencoe garages are expensive rural prices — fill at Stirling Asda or Callander Tesco before heading north on A82 if possible. If caught short, Tyndrum Green Welly has a forecourt.
Plug in BMW at Ballachulish tonight

days.title: Nevis Range Gondola + Jacobite / ScotRail to Mallaig
map_waypoints: Nevis Range Torlundy Fort William PH33 6SW
Fort William Railway Station Fort William PH33 6TQ

stops.name: Nevis Range Gondola
stops.detail: UK's only mountain gondola — 650m up. Dogs ride free, on lead. Snowgoose Cafe at top. Check mountain report night before.
stops.maps_query: Nevis Range Torlundy Fort William PH33 6SW

stops.name: Jacobite Steam Train (Option A — if running)
stops.detail: NOT currently bookable — ORR dispute. Sign up for alerts. If open: 2 separate bookings (Koda on one, Monty on other). 10:15 dep, Mallaig 12:25, return 14:10.

stops.name: ScotRail Fort William to Mallaig (Option B)
stops.detail: Same route, same Glenfinnan Viaduct — diesel not steam. ~10:55 dep, Mallaig 12:45, return 14:05. No advance booking needed.

stops.name: Mallaig Harbour
stops.detail: 1.5 hr stop. Walk the harbour. Fish & chips at Jaffy's or Cornerstone.

eating.name: Jaffy's Fish Bar, Mallaig
eating.detail: Arrive Mallaig ~12:30-13:00 on the train. Harbour-side fish & chips — eat on the waterfront with the dogs while waiting for the return. Cornerstone Café is a good alternative nearby.

eating.name: Crannog at Garrison West, Fort William
eating.detail: Best seafood in Fort William. Cameron Square. Leave dogs at Ballachulish first. Confirm site is still operating before trip.

notes: Leave Ballachulish by 08:00 for Nevis Range at 08:30
Fuel: Tesco Fort William is the last cheap supermarket petrol before Skye — fill up here today while in town for the train. Kyle of Lochalsh garage (tomorrow) is expensive.
Check gondola mountain report the night before: nevisrange.co.uk/mountain-report
Jacobite: register at westcoastrailways.co.uk for email alerts — book immediately if it opens
ScotRail: no booking needed — buy at Fort William station on the day

days.title: Ballachulish → Glendale, Isle of Skye
map_waypoints: Dunvegan Castle Isle of Skye IV55

stops.name: Eilean Donan Castle
stops.detail: Most photographed castle in Scotland. Dogs in grounds. Tag-team the interior.

stops.name: Kyle of Lochalsh — FUEL
stops.detail: FILL UP HERE. Last reliable fuel before Glendale — 20+ miles with nothing.
stops.maps_query: petrol station Kyle of Lochalsh IV40

stops.name: Skye Bridge
stops.detail: Toll-free. Lay-by on Skye side for photos.

stops.name: Dunvegan Castle (optional)
stops.detail: On route to Glendale. Dogs in grounds and walled garden.
stops.maps_query: Dunvegan Castle Isle of Skye IV55

eating.name: Broadford Co-op (supplies)
eating.detail: Stock up for 3 nights in Glendale.
eating.maps_query: Co-op Broadford Isle of Skye IV49

notes: FILL UP at Kyle — Glendale has NO fuel for 20+ miles. Kyle garage is expensive but unavoidable. Ideally filled cheaply at Tesco Fort William yesterday (Day 6).
Glendale road (B884) is relentlessly single-track — slow down
Sheep everywhere from here — Koda and Monty on leads near livestock
Plug in BMW at Glendale Airbnb — confirm socket with host

days.title: Skye — Trotternish Loop
map_waypoints: Old Man of Storr Car Park Isle of Skye
Kilt Rock Viewpoint Isle of Skye
Quiraing Car Park Isle of Skye
Fairy Glen Uig Isle of Skye

stops.name: Old Man of Storr — LOWER PATH ONLY
stops.detail: Lower car park fills by 09:30. Walk to first viewpoint and back ~1 mile only. SKIP steep upper section.
stops.maps_query: Old Man of Storr Car Park Isle of Skye

stops.name: Kilt Rock & Mealt Falls
stops.detail: 5-min roadside stop. Waterfall into sea. Almost no walking.
stops.maps_query: Kilt Rock viewpoint Isle of Skye

stops.name: Quiraing — first viewpoint only
stops.detail: Car park to first viewpoint and back ~0.6 miles. Skip the full 4.5-mile circuit.

stops.name: Faerie Glen, Uig
stops.detail: 20 min wander, mostly flat. Donation parking.
stops.maps_query: Fairy Glen Uig Isle of Skye

notes: Leave Glendale by 08:30 — Storr car park fills by 09:30, 1hr 50min away
Total walking today: ~2.2 miles — comfortable for Koda
Quiraing single-track road is tight on blind bends
Cloud in? Swap Storr for Brother's Point — nicer in murk and shorter

days.title: Stardust Boat + Sconser Golf + Talisker

golf.course: Isle of Skye Golf Club, Sconser

map_waypoints: Portree Harbour Isle of Skye IV51
Isle of Skye Golf Club Sconser IV48
Sligachan Hotel Isle of Skye IV47

stops.name: Stardust Boat Trips, Portree
stops.detail: Wildlife cruise — seals, sea eagles, dolphins. Dogs welcome. 2 hrs. Book ahead.

stops.name: Isle of Skye Golf Club, Sconser
stops.detail: 9 holes with Cuillins AND Red Hills views. Call 01478 650465.
stops.maps_query: Isle of Skye Golf Club Sconser IV48

stops.name: Sligachan Hotel
stops.detail: Iconic mountaineers' hotel. Dog-friendly bar, great ales.
stops.maps_query: Sligachan Hotel Isle of Skye IV47

stops.name: Talisker Distillery, Carbost
stops.detail: THE distillery on this trip. Tag-team — one tours, other walks dogs along Carbost Bay. Book ahead.

eating.name: Sligachan Hotel
eating.detail: Natural stop between Sconser golf and Talisker. Famous 19th-century coaching inn — huge dog-friendly beer garden with Cuillin views. Pub food all day.
eating.maps_query: Sligachan Hotel Isle of Skye IV47

eating.name: Three Chimneys, Colbost
eating.detail: Iconic Skye fine-dining, 5 min from Glendale. Book 4+ weeks ahead.

notes: BOOK AHEAD: Stardust boat, Talisker tour, Three Chimneys — all sell out in season
Sconser golf: call 01478 650465, club hire available

days.title: Glendale, Skye → Loch Ness (Brackla)

ballot_reminder.detail: Enter by 14:00. Results by 16:00. Need: name, home club, handicap index.

stops.name: Broadford Co-op — FUEL
stops.detail: Co-op Broadford is cheaper than Kyle garage — fill up here. Already stopping for supplies. Kyle garage is a fallback if missed.
stops.maps_query: Co-op Broadford Isle of Skye IV49

stops.name: Plodda Falls, Glen Affric
stops.detail: Tomich turn-off on A831. 30-min walk to a 150ft waterfall. Spectacular and quiet.

stops.name: Invermoriston Telford Bridge
stops.detail: Quick roadside stop — old stone bridge over the falls of Moriston.

notes: Falls of Foyers is 5 min from Brackla cottage — save for tomorrow morning
Fuel: If not filled at Broadford, Fort Augustus has a small garage on the A82 (on route). Inverness supermarkets are 30 min off-route but much cheaper if needed.
Brackla is the quiet south shore — away from the tourist crowds
Plug in BMW overnight at Brackla

days.title: Loch Ness Cruise + Urquhart Castle

stops.name: Falls of Foyers
stops.detail: 5 min from cottage. ~1.5 miles round trip to a 165ft waterfall.

stops.name: Cruise Loch Ness — STANDARD cruise only
stops.detail: Fort Augustus. 1-hour cruise. Dogs ONLY on standard boat, NOT the RIB. Book online.
stops.important: Standard cruise ONLY — RIB does not allow dogs

stops.name: Fort Augustus Canal Locks
stops.detail: Walk the 5-lock staircase with the dogs.

stops.name: Urquhart Castle
stops.detail: Pre-book (15% off). Dogs in grounds — not inside visitor centre. Avoid 11:00-14:00 rush.

stops.name: Loch Ness Hub e-bikes (optional)
stops.detail: Right by Urquhart. E-bikes from ~35/2hrs. Tag-team: one rides, other walks dogs.

notes: Book STANDARD Loch Ness cruise — NOT the RIB. Only standard boat takes dogs.
Loch Ness Experience also worth a visit: lochness.com

days.title: Loch Ness → Edinburgh (via Cairngorms)
map_waypoints: Loch an Eilein Car Park Rothiemurchus Cairngorms
House of Bruar Blair Atholl PH18 5TW

stops.name: Loch an Eilein, Cairngorms
stops.detail: 30 min off A9 at Aviemore. Flat 3-mile loop, island castle, off-lead zones. One of the UK's best picnic spots.
stops.maps_query: Loch an Eilein Car Park Rothiemurchus Cairngorms

stops.name: House of Bruar, Blair Atholl
stops.detail: The Harrods of the Highlands. Dog-friendly outside. Excellent food hall.
stops.maps_query: House of Bruar Blair Atholl PH18 5TW

stops.name: Edinburgh Zoo (Lesley's option)
stops.detail: If arriving at Portobello by 13:30 — leave dogs at Airbnb, both go together. Open until 18:00, last entry 17:00. No dogs inside.

notes: Leave Brackla by 09:30 — need time for Cairngorms + Bruar + Edinburgh
Fuel: Tesco Aviemore (right off the B970 near Cairngorms stop) or Tesco/Asda Perth on the A9 — both significantly cheaper than rural Highland stations. Fill at one of these.
Edinburgh rush hour brutal 16:00-18:30 — use A720 bypass to reach Portobello
Lothian Bus 26: Portobello to Princes Street, 25 min, dogs free
Plug in BMW at Portobello Airbnb

days.title: St Andrews — Old Course Ballot + Town

golf.course: The Old Course, St Andrews — daily ballot
golf.notes: ~30% success rate May/June. Budget ~400 if successful. Handicap proof required.

map_waypoints: West Sands Beach St Andrews KY16
R A World Golf Museum St Andrews

stops.name: West Sands Beach — Chariots of Fire beach
stops.detail: 2 miles of flat sand. Dogs welcome year-round. While David plays.
stops.maps_query: West Sands Beach St Andrews KY16

stops.name: Swilcan Bridge photo
stops.detail: Walk the public path along the 18th — free and unmissable.

stops.name: St Andrews Cathedral & St Rule's Tower
stops.detail: Atmospheric ruins. Dogs in grounds. Climb tower for the view.

stops.name: R&A World Golf Museum
stops.detail: Opposite 1st tee. Dog-friendly outdoor cafe terrace.
stops.maps_query: R A World Golf Museum St Andrews

eating.name: Cromars fish & chips
eating.maps_query: Cromars Fish and Chips St Andrews

notes: ~30% of tee times go via ballot in May/June — better odds than August
Handicap certificate required on the day — bring WHS index proof
Forth Road Bridge is free — no tolls
If unsuccessful: Crail Balcomie Links — walk-in 9-hole ~60 with hire

days.title: Musselburgh Golf + Edinburgh
map_waypoints: Musselburgh Old Links Golf Course EH21

stops.name: Portobello Beach — morning
stops.detail: Right outside the Airbnb. ~1 mile out and back at slow pace for Koda.

stops.name: Calton Hill
stops.detail: Easy 20-min uphill. Best city view. Off-lead at top.

stops.name: Royal Mile — walk DOWNHILL from Castle
stops.detail: Start at Castle Esplanade, walk downhill to Holyrood. ~1 mile gentle slope.

stops.name: Camera Obscura — dogs allowed inside
stops.detail: Well-behaved dogs on leads ARE permitted. Five floors. Good Koda rest stop.

stops.name: Water of Leith: Stockbridge to Dean Village (ONE WAY)
stops.detail: 1.5 miles ONE WAY only — bus back from Dean Village. Do not add the return trip.

notes: Total walking today: ~5 miles — right at Koda's limit. Drop Water of Leith if flagging.
Lothian Bus — tap contactless, dogs free. Bus everywhere between stops.
Don't leave dogs in the car in town at all.

days.title: Edinburgh → York (via Northumberland coast)
map_waypoints: Mercure York Fairfield Manor Shipton Road York YO30

stops.name: Alnwick Castle
stops.detail: Dogs in grounds. Barter Books (enormous second-hand bookshop) is dog-friendly.

stops.name: Bamburgh Castle & Beach
stops.detail: Most dramatic castle in England. Dogs on beach year-round. Miles of sand.

stops.name: Holy Island (Lindisfarne) — TIDE-DEPENDENT
stops.detail: Causeway closes ~5 hrs each tide. CHECK tide times before leaving Edinburgh.

stops.name: Scotch Corner Services — Dog break
stops.detail: ~100 miles from Holy Island. A1(M) J56. Grass area, fuel available. Quick comfort stop before the final 50 miles to York. Aim ~17:00.

eating.name: Ship Inn, Low Newton-by-the-Sea
eating.maps_query: Ship Inn Low Newton by the Sea

notes: CHECK HOLY ISLAND TIDES before leaving Edinburgh: holyislandcrossingtimes.northumberland.gov.uk
If time is tight: Bamburgh beach is more special than Alnwick — prioritise it

Fuel: Asda Hermiston Gait (off city bypass A71 end) or Tesco Corstorphine — both cheap and on the natural route south from Portobello. Fill before hitting the A1 — Northumberland rural stations are expensive.

days.title: York → Home (Pulloxhill)
map_waypoints: Bettys Cafe Tea Rooms York YO1 2QN
Tebay Services southbound M6 J38 Cumbria

stops.name: Bettys Cafe Tea Rooms
stops.detail: Leave dogs at hotel — both go together. Book Belmont Room in advance online.
stops.maps_query: Bettys Cafe Tea Rooms York YO1 2QN

stops.name: York City Walls — Bootham Bar to Monk Bar
stops.detail: Best 1-mile section. Dogs on lead. Free.

stops.name: The Shambles & Museum Gardens
stops.detail: Medieval streets + beautiful abbey gardens. Dogs on lead.

stops.name: Tebay Services southbound
stops.detail: The bookend to Day 1. About halfway home. Aim ~14:00.
stops.maps_query: Tebay Services southbound M6 J38 Cumbria

eating.name: Bettys Cafe Tea Rooms
eating.detail: Leave dogs at hotel. Book Belmont Room in advance.

notes: Leave York by 12:00 — M1 Sunday traffic bad from 15:00
Bettys: book Belmont Room in advance online
Welcome home! Trip of a lifetime. Work Monday.

bookings_required.action: Sign up for email alerts at westcoastrailways.co.uk
Enter ballot on TUESDAY 2 JUNE by 14:00

bookings_required.detail: Kitchin / Timberyard / The Witchery — 4-6 weeks ahead
Call Balmaha Boatyard the day before
